title: HM Trip Operations Dashboard

sql.statement:
WITH asset_scope AS (
  SELECT
    o.object_id,
    o.device_id,
    o.object_label,
    v.vehicle_id,
    v.vehicle_label,
    v.registration_number,
    COALESCE(v.vehicle_label, v.registration_number, o.object_label, o.device_id::text) AS asset_label
  FROM raw_business_data.objects o
  LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.vehicles v
    ON v.object_id = o.object_id
  WHERE COALESCE(o.is_deleted, false) = false
),
tracks_enriched AS (
  SELECT
    t.track_id,
    t.device_id,
    t.track_start_time,
    t.track_end_time,
    t.track_duration_seconds,
    t.track_distance_meters,
    t.avg_speed,
    t.max_speed,
    t.min_speed,
    s.object_id,
    s.vehicle_id,
    s.object_label,
    s.vehicle_label,
    s.registration_number,
    s.asset_label
  FROM business_data.tracks t
  LEFT JOIN asset_scope s
    ON s.device_id = t.device_id
),
params AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('day', now()) AS today_start,
    date_trunc('day', now()) - interval '1 day' AS yesterday_start,
    date_trunc('day', now()) - interval '7 day' AS last_7d_start
)

SELECT COUNT(*) AS value
FROM tracks_enriched t
CROSS JOIN params p
WHERE t.track_start_time >= p.yesterday_start
  AND t.track_start_time < p.today_start
  AND t.track_start_time::time >= time '08:00:00'
  AND t.track_start_time::time < time '19:00:00'

WITH asset_scope AS (

)

SELECT
  t.track_start_time::date AS category,
  COUNT(*) AS value
FROM tracks_enriched t
CROSS JOIN params p
WHERE t.track_start_time >= p.last_7d_start
  AND t.track_start_time < p.today_start
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Active Driving Ratio by Day — Last 7 Days (%)

sql.statement:
WITH asset_scope AS (
  SELECT
    o.object_id,
    o.device_id,
    o.object_label,
    v.vehicle_id,
    v.vehicle_label,
    v.registration_number,
    COALESCE(v.vehicle_label, v.registration_number, o.object_label, o.device_id::text) AS asset_label
  FROM raw_business_data.objects o
  LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.vehicles v
    ON v.object_id = o.object_id
  WHERE COALESCE(o.is_deleted, false) = false
),
tracks_enriched AS (
  SELECT
    t.track_id,
    t.device_id,
    t.track_start_time,
    t.track_end_time,
    t.track_duration_seconds,
    t.track_distance_meters,
    t.avg_speed,
    t.max_speed,
    t.min_speed,
    s.object_id,
    s.vehicle_id,
    s.object_label,
    s.vehicle_label,
    s.registration_number,
    s.asset_label
  FROM business_data.tracks t
  LEFT JOIN asset_scope s
    ON s.device_id = t.device_id
),
params AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('day', now()) AS today_start,
    date_trunc('day', now()) - interval '1 day' AS yesterday_start,
    date_trunc('day', now()) - interval '7 day' AS last_7d_start
)

, all_objects AS (
  SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT object_id) AS total_objects
  FROM asset_scope
),
daily_active AS (
  SELECT
    t.track_start_time::date AS trip_day,
    COUNT(DISTINCT t.object_id) AS active_objects
  FROM tracks_enriched t
  CROSS JOIN params p
  WHERE t.track_start_time >= p.last_7d_start
    AND t.track_start_time < p.today_start
    AND t.object_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT
  d.trip_day AS category,
  ROUND(100.0 * d.active_objects / NULLIF(a.total_objects, 0), 2) AS value
FROM daily_active d
CROSS JOIN all_objects a
ORDER BY d.trip_day

panels.title: Active vs Inactive Objects — Last 7 Days

sql.statement:
WITH asset_scope AS (
  SELECT
    o.object_id,
    o.device_id,
    o.object_label,
    v.vehicle_id,
    v.vehicle_label,
    v.registration_number,
    COALESCE(v.vehicle_label, v.registration_number, o.object_label, o.device_id::text) AS asset_label
  FROM raw_business_data.objects o
  LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.vehicles v
    ON v.object_id = o.object_id
  WHERE COALESCE(o.is_deleted, false) = false
),
tracks_enriched AS (
  SELECT
    t.track_id,
    t.device_id,
    t.track_start_time,
    t.track_end_time,
    t.track_duration_seconds,
    t.track_distance_meters,
    t.avg_speed,
    t.max_speed,
    t.min_speed,
    s.object_id,
    s.vehicle_id,
    s.object_label,
    s.vehicle_label,
    s.registration_number,
    s.asset_label
  FROM business_data.tracks t
  LEFT JOIN asset_scope s
    ON s.device_id = t.device_id
),
params AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('day', now()) AS today_start,
    date_trunc('day', now()) - interval '1 day' AS yesterday_start,
    date_trunc('day', now()) - interval '7 day' AS last_7d_start
)

, all_objects AS (
  SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT object_id) AS total_objects
  FROM asset_scope
),
active_objects AS (
  SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t.object_id) AS active_objects
  FROM tracks_enriched t
  CROSS JOIN params p
  WHERE t.track_start_time >= p.last_7d_start
    AND t.track_start_time < p.today_start
    AND t.object_id IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 'Active objects' AS category, active_objects AS value
FROM active_objects
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Inactive objects' AS category, (a.total_objects - x.active_objects) AS value
FROM all_objects a
CROSS JOIN active_objects x

WITH asset_scope AS (
  SELECT
    o.object_id,
    o.device_id,
    o.object_label,
    v.vehicle_id,
    v.vehicle_label,
    v.registration_number,
    COALESCE(v.vehicle_label, v.registration_number, o.object_label, o.device_id::text) AS asset_label
  FROM raw_business_data.objects o
  LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.vehicles v
    ON v.object_id = o.object_id
  WHERE COALESCE(o.is_deleted, false) = false
),
tracks_enriched AS (
  SELECT
    t.track_id,
    t.device_id,
    t.track_start_time,
    t.track_end_time,
    t.track_duration_seconds,
    t.track_distance_meters,
    t.avg_speed,
    t.max_speed,
    t.min_speed,
    s.object_id,
    s.vehicle_id,
    s.object_label,
    s.vehicle_label,
    s.registration_number,
    s.asset_label
  FROM business_data.tracks t
  LEFT JOIN asset_scope s
    ON s.device_id = t.device_id
),
params AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('day', now()) AS today_start,
    date_trunc('day', now()) - interval '1 day' AS yesterday_start,
    date_trunc('day', now()) - interval '7 day' AS last_7d_start
)

, all_objects AS (
  SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT object_id) AS total_objects
  FROM asset_scope
),
active_objects AS (
  SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t.object_id) AS active_objects
  FROM tracks_enriched t
  CROSS JOIN params p
  WHERE t.track_start_time >= p.yesterday_start
    AND t.track_start_time < p.today_start
    AND t.object_id IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 'Active objects' AS category, active_objects AS value
FROM active_objects
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Inactive objects' AS category, (a.total_objects - x.active_objects) AS value
FROM all_objects a
CROSS JOIN active_objects x

panels.title: Top 5 Vehicles by Avg Trips per Active Day — Last 7 Days

sql.statement:
WITH asset_scope AS (
  SELECT
    o.object_id,
    o.device_id,
    o.object_label,
    v.vehicle_id,
    v.vehicle_label,
    v.registration_number,
    COALESCE(v.vehicle_label, v.registration_number, o.object_label, o.device_id::text) AS asset_label
  FROM raw_business_data.objects o
  LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.vehicles v
    ON v.object_id = o.object_id
  WHERE COALESCE(o.is_deleted, false) = false
),
tracks_enriched AS (
  SELECT
    t.track_id,
    t.device_id,
    t.track_start_time,
    t.track_end_time,
    t.track_duration_seconds,
    t.track_distance_meters,
    t.avg_speed,
    t.max_speed,
    t.min_speed,
    s.object_id,
    s.vehicle_id,
    s.object_label,
    s.vehicle_label,
    s.registration_number,
    s.asset_label
  FROM business_data.tracks t
  LEFT JOIN asset_scope s
    ON s.device_id = t.device_id
),
params AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('day', now()) AS today_start,
    date_trunc('day', now()) - interval '1 day' AS yesterday_start,
    date_trunc('day', now()) - interval '7 day' AS last_7d_start
)

, daily_counts AS (
  SELECT
    t.vehicle_id,
    t.asset_label,
    t.track_start_time::date AS trip_day,
    COUNT(*) AS trips_per_day
  FROM tracks_enriched t
  CROSS JOIN params p
  WHERE t.track_start_time >= p.last_7d_start
    AND t.track_start_time < p.today_start
  GROUP BY 1,2,3
)
SELECT
  COALESCE(asset_label, vehicle_id::text, 'Unmapped') AS category,
  ROUND(AVG(trips_per_day), 2) AS value
FROM daily_counts
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY value DESC, category
LIMIT 5

WITH asset_scope AS (
  SELECT
    o.object_id,
    o.device_id,
    o.object_label,
    v.vehicle_id,
    v.vehicle_label,
    v.registration_number,
    COALESCE(v.vehicle_label, v.registration_number, o.object_label, o.device_id::text) AS asset_label
  FROM raw_business_data.objects o
  LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.vehicles v
    ON v.object_id = o.object_id
  WHERE COALESCE(o.is_deleted, false) = false
),
tracks_enriched AS (
  SELECT
    t.track_id,
    t.device_id,
    t.track_start_time,
    t.track_end_time,
    t.track_duration_seconds,
    t.track_distance_meters,
    t.avg_speed,
    t.max_speed,
    t.min_speed,
    s.object_id,
    s.vehicle_id,
    s.object_label,
    s.vehicle_label,
    s.registration_number,
    s.asset_label
  FROM business_data.tracks t
  LEFT JOIN asset_scope s
    ON s.device_id = t.device_id
),
params AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('day', now()) AS today_start,
    date_trunc('day', now()) - interval '1 day' AS yesterday_start,
    date_trunc('day', now()) - interval '7 day' AS last_7d_start
)

SELECT
  t.vehicle_id,
  t.asset_label,
  t.object_id,
  t.device_id,
  t.track_id,
  t.track_start_time,
  t.track_end_time,
  ROUND(t.track_duration_seconds / 3600.0, 2) AS trip_duration_hours,
  ROUND(t.track_distance_meters / 1000.0, 2) AS trip_distance_km
FROM tracks_enriched t
CROSS JOIN params p
WHERE t.track_start_time >= p.yesterday_start
  AND t.track_start_time < p.today_start
ORDER BY t.track_duration_seconds DESC NULLS LAST, t.track_id
LIMIT 5

WITH asset_scope AS (
  SELECT
    o.object_id,
    o.device_id,
    o.object_label,
    v.vehicle_id,
    v.vehicle_label,
    v.registration_number,
    COALESCE(v.vehicle_label, v.registration_number, o.object_label, o.device_id::text) AS asset_label
  FROM raw_business_data.objects o
  LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.vehicles v
    ON v.object_id = o.object_id
  WHERE COALESCE(o.is_deleted, false) = false
),
tracks_enriched AS (
  SELECT
    t.track_id,
    t.device_id,
    t.track_start_time,
    t.track_end_time,
    t.track_duration_seconds,
    t.track_distance_meters,
    t.avg_speed,
    t.max_speed,
    t.min_speed,
    s.object_id,
    s.vehicle_id,
    s.object_label,
    s.vehicle_label,
    s.registration_number,
    s.asset_label
  FROM business_data.tracks t
  LEFT JOIN asset_scope s
    ON s.device_id = t.device_id
),
params AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('day', now()) AS today_start,
    date_trunc('day', now()) - interval '1 day' AS yesterday_start,
    date_trunc('day', now()) - interval '7 day' AS last_7d_start
)

SELECT
  t.vehicle_id,
  t.asset_label,
  t.object_id,
  t.device_id,
  t.track_id,
  t.track_start_time,
  t.track_end_time,
  ROUND(t.track_duration_seconds / 3600.0, 2) AS trip_duration_hours,
  ROUND(t.track_distance_meters / 1000.0, 2) AS trip_distance_km
FROM tracks_enriched t
CROSS JOIN params p
WHERE t.track_start_time >= p.last_7d_start
  AND t.track_start_time < p.today_start
ORDER BY t.track_duration_seconds DESC NULLS LAST, t.track_id
LIMIT 5

WITH params AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('day', now()) - interval '1 day' AS yesterday_start,
    date_trunc('day', now()) AS today_start
)
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS trips_max_speed_gt_120_yesterday
FROM business_data.tracks t
CROSS JOIN params p
WHERE t.track_start_time >= p.yesterday_start
  AND t.track_start_time < p.today_start
  AND t.max_speed > 120;

WITH params AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('day', now()) - interval '7 day' AS last_7d_start,
    date_trunc('day', now()) AS today_start
)
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS trips_max_speed_gt_120_last_7d
FROM business_data.tracks t
CROSS JOIN params p
WHERE t.track_start_time >= p.last_7d_start
  AND t.track_start_time < p.today_start
  AND t.max_speed > 120;

panels.title: Average speed and max speed for the last 7 days

sql.statement:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('day', now()) - interval '7 day' AS last_7d_start,
    date_trunc('day', now()) AS today_start
)
SELECT
  t.track_start_time::date AS trip_day,
  ROUND(AVG(t.avg_speed)::numeric, 2) AS avg_speed_daily,
  ROUND(AVG(t.max_speed)::numeric, 2) AS max_speed_daily_avg,
  ROUND(MAX(t.max_speed)::numeric, 2) AS max_speed_daily_peak
FROM business_data.tracks t
CROSS JOIN params p
WHERE t.track_start_time >= p.last_7d_start
  AND t.track_start_time < p.today_start
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

WITH params AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('day', now()) - interval '1 day' AS yesterday_start,
    date_trunc('day', now()) AS today_start
)
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS trips_avg_speed_gt_80_yesterday
FROM business_data.tracks t
CROSS JOIN params p
WHERE t.track_start_time >= p.yesterday_start
  AND t.track_start_time < p.today_start
  AND t.avg_speed > 80;

WITH params AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('day', now()) - interval '7 day' AS last_7d_start,
    date_trunc('day', now()) AS today_start
)
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS trips_avg_speed_gt_80_last_7d
FROM business_data.tracks t
CROSS JOIN params p
WHERE t.track_start_time >= p.last_7d_start
  AND t.track_start_time < p.today_start
  AND t.avg_speed > 80;

panels.title: Top 5 trips by max speed with vehicle label for the last 7 days

sql.statement:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('day', now()) - interval '7 day' AS last_7d_start,
    date_trunc('day', now()) AS today_start
),
tracks_enriched AS (
  SELECT
    t.track_id,
    t.device_id,
    t.track_start_time,
    t.track_end_time,
    t.track_duration_seconds,
    t.track_distance_meters,
    t.avg_speed,
    t.max_speed,
    o.object_id,
    v.vehicle_id,
    COALESCE(v.vehicle_label, v.registration_number, o.object_label, t.device_id::text) AS vehicle_name
  FROM business_data.tracks t
  LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.objects o
    ON o.device_id = t.device_id
   AND COALESCE(o.is_deleted, false) = false
  LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.vehicles v
    ON v.object_id = o.object_id
)
SELECT
  vehicle_id,
  vehicle_name,
  track_id,
  track_start_time,
  track_end_time,
  ROUND(avg_speed::numeric, 2) AS avg_speed,
  ROUND(max_speed::numeric, 2) AS max_speed,
  ROUND(track_duration_seconds / 60.0, 2) AS trip_duration_minutes,
  ROUND(track_distance_meters / 1000.0, 2) AS trip_distance_km
FROM tracks_enriched t
CROSS JOIN params p
WHERE t.track_start_time >= p.last_7d_start
  AND t.track_start_time < p.today_start
  AND t.max_speed IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY t.max_speed DESC, t.track_start_time DESC
LIMIT 5;

description: Dashboard generated from the trip metrics list and the provided example JSON. It uses business_data.tracks enriched with raw_business_data.objects and raw_business_data.vehicles so charts and tables show human-readable asset labels where available.
